title: Fish on a Leash!
description:
Manage your leashable entities!
Choose which mobs can be put on a lead.
body:
This simple mod will allow you to use a lead on mobs that are normally not leashable in vanilla Minecraft.

To enable or disable which mobs can be leashed, edit the config file directly or use [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu). Beware that it takes a restart for changes to take effect.

All included mobs can be put on leads by default, except Villagers, Illagers, and Witches.

![A screenshot of the mod's settings in the Mod Menu UI.](https://i.imgur.com/NKWth2Y.png)

**Please note** that for the best experience possible on servers, the client configuration should match the exact server configuration (configure it by editing the "fish_on_a_leash.json" file located at the "config" folder inside your server's directory). If this mod is not installed and configured on both client and server sides, some mobs will stay unleashable.
